title: rumex patientia subsp. eupatientia
intro: Rumex patientia subsp. eupatientia, also known as patience dock or garden patience, is a subspecies of perennial herb in the buckwheat family Polygonaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful in treating a variety of health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and arthritis. In herbal preparations, patience dock is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in topical applications such as salves and creams.
